title: Mork Manual - Flip through, review, and session 0 (solo RPG) (Mork Borg)
body:
In this video, we take an in-depth look at the Mork Manual, a fantasy reimagining of Mork Borg by Rodney Rick Road. We provide a comprehensive flip-through and review of the book, highlighting its unique blend of traditional fantasy elements with the dark, minimalist style of Mork Borg. The video praises the simplified rules, compatibility with existing Mork Borg supplements, and the inclusion of an extensive bestiary. Additionally, we create a character and discuss plans for a solo RPG adventure using the Mork Manual.

If you’re a fan of Mork Borg but have been craving a more traditional fantasy setting, this video is a must-watch. We not only review the Mork Manual but also set the stage for an exciting solo adventure, making it a perfect introduction for anyone interested in solo RPGs or expanding their Mork Borg experience with a rich, fantasy-themed twist.
